visuals.title: Partial Failure in a Distributed System
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Partial Failure in a Distributed System
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 800 600">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg-gradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#001428"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#003366"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="glow">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3.5" result="coloredBlur"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="coloredBlur"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="url(#bg-gradient)"/>
  
  <!-- Title -->
  <text x="400" y="50" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="24" fill="white" font-weight="bold">
    Challenges in Distributed Systems
  </text>
  
  <!-- Network Issues -->
  <g transform="translate(150, 150)">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="40" fill="#ff6b6b" filter="url(#glow)">
      <animate attributeName="r" values="40;45;40" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    </circle>
    <text x="0" y="5" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Network Issues</text>
    <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="translate" values="0,0;0,-5;0,0" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Clock Synchronization -->
  <g transform="translate(400, 150)">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="40" fill="#4ecdc4" filter="url(#glow)">
      <animate attributeName="fill" values="#4ecdc4;#1a92cc;#4ecdc4" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    </circle>
    <text x="0" y="5" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Clock Sync</text>
    <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="rotate" from="0" to="360" dur="10s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Data Consistency -->
  <g transform="translate(650, 150)">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="40" fill="#ffd166" filter="url(#glow)">
      <animate attributeName="opacity" values="1;0.7;1" dur="2.5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    </circle>
    <text x="0" y="5" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Data Consistency</text>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Security -->
  <g transform="translate(150, 350)">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="40" fill="#f25f5c" filter="url(#glow)">
      <animate attributeName="r" values="40;35;40" dur="1.5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    </circle>
    <text x="0" y="5" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Security</text>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Scalability -->
  <g transform="translate(400, 350)">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="40" fill="#06d6a0" filter="url(#glow)">
      <animate attributeName="cx" values="0;5;0;-5;0" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    </circle>
    <text x="0" y="5" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Scalability</text>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Fault Tolerance -->
  <g transform="translate(650, 350)">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="40" fill="#118ab2" filter="url(#glow)">
      <animate attributeName="fill" values="#118ab2;#073b4c;#118ab2" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    </circle>
    <text x="0" y="5" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Fault Tolerance</text>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Connecting lines -->
  <line x1="190" y1="150" x2="360" y2="150" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,5">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="0;10" dur="1s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="440" y1="150" x2="610" y2="150" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,5">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="0;10" dur="1s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="190" y1="350" x2="360" y2="350" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,5">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="0;10" dur="1s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="440" y1="350" x2="610" y2="350" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,5">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" values="0;10" dur="1s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Central node -->
  <circle cx="400" cy="250" r="60" fill="#073b4c" stroke="#ef476f" stroke-width="3">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-width" values="3;5;3" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="400" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="16" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Distributed System</text>
  
  <!-- Connection lines from center -->
  <line x1="340" y1="250" x2="190" y2="150" stroke="white" stroke-width="2">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-opacity" values="0.3;1;0.3" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="460" y1="250" x2="610" y2="150" stroke="white" stroke-width="2">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-opacity" values="0.3;1;0.3" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="340" y1="250" x2="190" y2="350" stroke="white" stroke-width="2">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-opacity" values="0.3;1;0.3" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="460" y1="250" x2="610" y2="350" stroke="white" stroke-width="2">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-opacity" values="0.3;1;0.3" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
  </line>
</svg>

diagrams.title: Partial Failure in a Distributed System
